recent_excerpts: Vercel disclosed a breach after stolen OAuth tokens from Context.ai enabled unauthorized access to internal systems via a connected app. No customer data exposed.
BHIS released a cloud security guide covering IAM misconfigurations, shared responsibility gaps, and logging blind spots — essential reading for teams securing AWS, Azure, or GCP…
Elastic Security XDR now correlates endpoint telemetry with cloud and network data, enabling analysts to trace multi-stage attacks across hybrid environments in a single query…
